name: OpenSearch node-to-node encryption disabled
description: Node-to-node encryption is not enabled for this OpenSearch domain. Without it, data travelling between the nodes of a multi-node cluster is transmitted in plaintext over the internal network, exposing it to eavesdropping on the VPC.
remediation: Enable node-to-node encryption. Like encryption at rest, this requires domain recreation. Migrate data to a new domain with both encryption at rest and node-to-node encryption enabled.
